releaseNotes:
v1.0.1 bug fixes:
- Right-side checkout panel is now scrollable, so the Clear Cart, Print, Hold, Recall, Reprint and Return buttons stay reachable on smaller screens.
- Receipts can now be printed on regular inkjet/laser printers (not only thermal ESC/POS). Switch to 'Standard Windows Printer' under Settings -> Printers -> Receipt Printer Type to stop jobs getting stuck in the print queue.
